info.title: dotnet-i18n-translate
info.description: Helper tool to translate ngx translate files

options.name: --language
options.description: (Default: en) The language to start from

options.name: --target
options.description:
The target language. If unset, all languages will be
selected.

options.name: --authkey
options.description:
Required. DeepL Auth Key. If not set, tries to use
DeepLAuthKey environment variable instead. Required if no
such variable exists.

options.name: --key
options.description:
Specific key to translate. If it already exists it will be
overwritten.

options.name: --validate
options.description: (Default: false) Only validate without actually translating.
